prompt: Create a spike ticket to investigate extracting notifications into dedicated `data/notification` and `feature/notifications` modules as described in `modularisation.md`. Research the current notification implementation first and stop at the draft.
assertions: The draft uses the spike template structure with Background, Current Knowledge, Scope, Outcomes, and Deliverables.

The response references modularisation.md together with current notification implementation files such as NotificationsScreen, NotificationsViewModel, NotificationsOrchestrator, or data/notification classes.
The response stops in draft/approval mode and does not create the issue yet.
The draft strictly follows the rule of NOT repeating the ticket title as a heading or text inside the issue body description.

When the issue is created (or when writing the body file), the body file content must NOT start with a code fence delimiter (```). The file written to the temp directory must contain raw markdown, not a code-fenced block.
